'''zhazulu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mcauslanite|mcauslanite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-z-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mcauslanite|mcauslanite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| zhazulu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæzilith|zhæzilith]] || [[word:zhæzilij|zhæzilij]] || [[word:zhæzilish|zhæzilish]] || [[word:zhæzili|zhæzili]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhazuzuluth|zhazuzuluth]] || [[word:zhazuzuluj|zhazuzuluj]] || [[word:zhazuzulush|zhazuzulush]] || [[word:zhazuzulu|zhazuzulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhazuluth|zhazuluth]] || [[word:zhazuluj|zhazuluj]] || [[word:zhazulush|zhazulush]] || [[word:zhazulu|zhazulu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhazufluth|zhazufluth]] || [[word:zhazufluj|zhazufluj]] || [[word:zhazuflush|zhazuflush]] || [[word:zhazufluf|zhazufluf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhazuluthu|zhazuluthu]] || [[word:zhazuluju|zhazuluju]] || [[word:zhazulushu|zhazulushu]] || [[word:zhazuluku|zhazuluku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhazuluth|zhazuluth]] || [[word:zhazuluj|zhazuluj]] || [[word:zhazulush|zhazulush]] || [[word:zhazulu|zhazulu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhazuluthul|zhazuluthul]] || [[word:zhazulujul|zhazulujul]] || [[word:zhazulushul|zhazulushul]] || [[word:zhazulukul|zhazulukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhazuluthuthu|zhazuluthuthu]] || [[word:zhazulujuju|zhazulujuju]] || [[word:zhazulushushu|zhazulushushu]] || [[word:zhazuluku|zhazuluku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhazuluthun|zhazuluthun]] || [[word:zhazulujun|zhazulujun]] || [[word:zhazulushun|zhazulushun]] || [[word:zhazulukun|zhazulukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhazuluthuoro|zhazuluthuoro]] || [[word:zhazulujuoro|zhazulujuoro]] || [[word:zhazulushuoro|zhazulushuoro]] || [[word:zhazulukuoro|zhazulukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
